name: JengaBench
description: A deterministic visual benchmark for spatial reasoning and physical planning in an unstable Jenga tower.

binding_vow.description: Inspect rendered JengaBench camera views and return one JSON object per turn containing a short context string plus one structured ChangeViewpoint, Push, or PlaceBack action.

observation_space.description: A PNG render from the current persistent camera viewpoint.

action_space.description: Return one JSON object with `context` and `action`. `context` is a short rationale string. `action` is either ChangeViewpoint with compass direction, elevation layer, Close/Medium/Full distance, and optional target block; Push with layer, positional color, axial face, left/center/right contact, and Gentle/Firm/Hard intensity; or PlaceBack with an available Left/Middle/Right slot.

reward.description: Successful extractions score +1, valid camera changes and placements score 0, invalid actions score -0.5, collapse terminates the episode, and ten turns without a successful extraction terminate with -10.
